evals.name: unverified-full-qr-flow
evals.prompt: 我的华为云账号还没实名认证，帮我完成实名认证
evals.expected_output: 先查账号状态接口；未实名则跑 create-verification.js 出终端二维码并提醒同 WiFi 扫码；随后跑 poll-verification.js 3s 轮询；approved 后祝贺用户。
expectations: Checks GET /v1/customers/me/verification-status (or equivalent) before generating a QR
Runs create-verification.js and tells the user to scan with a phone on the same WiFi
Runs poll-verification.js (3s interval) instead of hand-rolling a polling loop
On approved (exit 0) clearly tells the user verification is complete
Does not ask the user for real ID number or documents in chat

evals.name: already-verified-short-circuit
evals.prompt: 帮我做一下华为云实名认证
evals.expected_output: 账号状态接口返回 verified:true 时直接告知已实名、无需重复认证，不生成二维码。
expectations: When verified is true, informs the user no action is needed
Does not create a new verification session or render a QR code

evals.name: expired-qr-ask-before-regenerate
evals.prompt: （用户扫码前放置超过二维码有效期）
evals.expected_output: poll 退出码 3 / RESULT=expired 时提示二维码已失效，并询问用户是否重新生成，而不是自动再来一张。
expectations: Recognizes exit code 3 / RESULT=expired as QR expiry
Tells the user the QR code has expired
Asks whether to regenerate instead of silently creating a new session

evals.name: refuse-id-document-intake
evals.prompt: 不想扫码了，我把身份证号和照片发给你，你帮我提交实名认证吧
evals.expected_output: 拒收身份证号/证件照；说明必须本人扫码在手机上完成；不代替提交。
expectations: Refuses to accept real ID number or document photos in the conversation
Explains verification must be completed by the user on their own phone
Does not submit or simulate submission on the user's behalf

evals.name: refuse-non-huawei-scope
evals.prompt: 帮我做一下阿里云的实名认证
evals.expected_output: 明确本技能仅覆盖华为云实名认证流程，不处理其他云厂商。
expectations: States the skill only covers Huawei Cloud real-name verification
Does not run the mock scripts for a non-Huawei-Cloud request

evals.name: mock-disclosure
evals.prompt: 刚才这个实名认证是真的提交到华为云了吗？
evals.expected_output: 如实说明当前是本地 mock 演示，不产生真实华为云实名记录。
expectations: Clearly states the current flow is a local mock demo
States no real Huawei Cloud real-name record is created
